purpose: Local control-plane registry for recurring operation routes. Use it before rediscovering browser, upload/download, tool-bridge, provider, or search routes that have known success and failure paths. Entries are not evidence or citations and the registry does not grant provider permission, browser approval, connector approval, MCP approval, install approval, hook approval, or automatic execution.

negative_triggers: user explicitly requests the visible PC Chrome download route
applies_when: The user wants Codex to attach a local ZIP or context bundle to visible ChatGPT or GPT Pro.
The Codex in-app browser runtime exposes tab.clipboard.write for attachment payloads.
Visible ChatGPT browser use is approved for the current task.
do_not_use_when: The task is to download a ZIP or generated artifact from ChatGPT.
The user asks for OpenAI API usage instead of visible ChatGPT web control.
The in-app browser clipboard attachment route is unavailable.
The target file is not a local ZIP or context bundle.
routes.canonical_first_action: Use the Codex in-app browser clipboard attachment route first: read the local ZIP bytes from disk, call tab.clipboard.write with an application/zip clipboard item and presentationStyle attachment, focus the ChatGPT composer, paste, verify a visible ZIP chip such as Zip アーカイブ, fill the prompt only after the chip is visible, submit exactly once, and wait for real visible completion.
known_failed_routes: askWithFiles or normal file chooser as the first route for this known Codex Desktop ZIP upload class
Codex in-app browser file chooser after a ChatGPT red Something went wrong banner
Chrome extension chooser.setFiles returning Not allowed
direct #upload-files targeting when ChatGPT exposes multiple upload inputs
raw CDP upload or Runtime.evaluate upload attempts
Markdown-wrapped base64 clipboard payload instead of raw ZIP bytes encoded as base64
success_verification: A visible ZIP chip appears in the ChatGPT composer.
The chip is identified as a ZIP archive, for example Zip アーカイブ.
The prompt is submitted exactly once after the ZIP chip is visible.
The final assistant answer is captured only after visible completion and stability.
gates: Requires explicit visible ChatGPT/browser approval in the current task.
Does not grant provider API, hidden endpoint, network search, MCP, connector, install, or hook permission.
ChatGPT output remains consultation output and not project evidence.
Do not loop over known failed upload routes before using the canonical first action.
